work_unit: SZ-SP-M-001: Draw mode replaces all regions instead of appending
situation: handleMouseUp for 'draw' mode in SidePanelApp.tsx called onRegionsChange with a single-element array literal, discarding all previously drawn regions. Drawing a second region would lose the first. Also missing 'regions' in useCallback deps causing stale closure.
action: Changed line 692 from `onRegionsChange?.([{ ...drawPreview, label: '手动' }])` to `onRegionsChange?.([...(regions || []), { ...drawPreview, label: '手动' }])`. Added 'regions' to useCallback dependency array at line 704. Direct edit in diverged worktree (cp-guard skip per case-104 escape hatch).
outcome_evidence: Commit 11ad8e5 on auto/opt-sidepanel-1782907225 pushed to origin. Diff shows spread of existing regions before new drawn region. Dependency array includes 'regions'.
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: SZ-SP-M-002 (getHistory message has no .catch — permanent loading state) in HistoryTab.tsx

audit_findings.finding: Draw mode handleMouseUp replaces all regions with single-element array instead of appending
audit_findings.remediation: Spread existing regions before new drawn region: [...(regions || []), newRegion]
